logout.title: Confirm Logout
logout.description: Are you sure you want to securely logout from the system?
logout.error: Failed to logout. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: This permanently removes your account from the system. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

adminSettings.title: Settings & Configuration
adminSettings.description: Manage your admin account, user accounts, scheduling rules, notifications, and demo data from one place.

passwordErrors.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from the current password.
passwordErrors.doesNotMeetRules: New password does not meet all rules.

userAccounts.title: User Account Management
userAccounts.search: Search by name, email, or ID
userAccounts.name: Name
userAccounts.noAccounts: No accounts match the current filters.

deleteDialog.title: Delete account
deleteDialog.description: This permanently removes {{name}}'s account and its linked {{role}} record.
deleteDialog.warning: Accounts that still hold schedule assignments cannot be deleted until those assignments are removed.

demoData.title: Constraint Scheduling Demo Dataset
demoData.description: Generate persistent feasible datasets A, B, and C. Regeneration preserves existing schedules, and Clear Demo Data removes the selected demo dataset only when an admin explicitly confirms it.
demoData.cleanSchedulePathDesc: Each dataset is sized to remain feasible for the Hybrid Constraint-Based Scheduling Algorithm.
demoData.relationalCoverageDesc: Students connect to registrations, offerings, exams, schedules, assignments, and the calendar view.
demoData.persistentDemoDataDesc: Datasets stay in the database across refreshes and restarts until an admin explicitly clears demo data.
demoData.safeCleanupDesc: Clear Demo Data removes the selected demo dataset, its schedules, assignments, and related demo entities without touching manually created records outside that dataset.
demoData.chooseDataset: Choose between dataset A, B, C, FEIT Spring 2027, or the FEIT Real Data before generation.
demoData.datasetADetail: 18 offerings, 4 centers, 10 rooms, and a fully feasible balanced scheduling workload.
demoData.datasetBDetail: 44 offerings with more students, more campuses, more proctors, and a wider feasible time-slot grid.
demoData.datasetCDetail: 60 offerings with the highest realistic scale, expanded rooms, centers, enrollments, and proctor coverage.
demoData.datasetREALDetail: Real FEIT Spring 2026 course offerings: 35 offerings (29 producing exams), real instructors, sections, lecture day/time, BME / CCE / CS / EE programs, 4 FEIT centers, and 12 rooms. PROJECT and LAB-only offerings keep their CourseOffering but do NOT generate exams or join scheduling.
demoData.datasetFEIT2027Detail: 52 FEIT-style offerings, 1080 students, 58 mixed-capacity rooms, 88 mixed-availability proctors, and 22 uneven time slots designed to create visible optimization opportunities without automatic schedule clearing.
demoData.clearDatasetWarning: Delete the related schedule first from Schedule Versions. After that, the dataset can be removed together with its assignments, enrollments, rooms, proctors, time slots, and related demo-generated records.
demoData.generationInProgressDetail: Creating the semester, academic structure, registrations, rooms, proctors, and time slots. Existing schedules remain untouched.
demoData.confirmClearDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently remove the {{dataset}} dataset and all its associated data including schedules, assignments, enrollments, rooms, proctors, time slots, and related entities?
demoData.clearWarning: This action cannot be undone. Ensure you have deleted related schedules from Schedule Versions before proceeding.
